SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_INPP_COPAY_3M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Plans that use a coinsurance percentage amount rather than a co-payment will not have a value in this 
field; see instead the corresponding coinsurance variable called (PRE_ICL_INPP_COINS_3M).
